docs.text: Awesome Tools A curated list of awesome tools for dev, design, and life. Inspired by awesome-python . Awesome Tools Backend Dev Branding Design DevOps Frontend Dev Knowledge Graph Language LaTeX Life Machine Learning Must-Read Papers Machine Learning Miscellaneous Philosophy Life Aerial - a very nice Mac screensaver (Yes, it works with recent Mac version that SaveHollywood gave up; so please buy them a coffee) Archive.org-Downloader - Python3 script for downloading archive.org books in PDF format bilibili-downloader - Bilibili 4K 视频下载 Converting Tweet to image Handbrake - The best free open source video format converter. HoYo-Glyphs - 原神提瓦特文 字体文件 Mousecape - 可莉像素指针 Mac 版 运行工具 Project Gutenberg - Free books for read and data analytics TiddlyDesktop Genymobile gnirehtet - Allows Android devices to use the internet connection of the computer they are plugged on scrcpy - Mirroring our Android screens onto our Mac screens and monitors sndcpy - scrpy companion: forwarding audio from an Android 10 device to the computer 原神角色 AI 语音合成器 - 输入文本，生成可下载原神角色语音 Philosophy Dictionary of Scholastic Philosophy - A must-have for anyone studying philosophy with well written definitions and amazing charts/diagrams. Communication [Hemingway App] - Make your written ideas easier to understand Branding HashiCorp TypeScript Machine Learning Deep Learning Tutorial MIT Deep Learning Book Must-Read Papers Reinforcement Learning: An Introduction by Sutton and Barto - is the introductory book on RL. It covers very basics and build up from there. Does not cover deep RL. Open Training Data Huatuo-26M - 中文医疗问答数据集 Knowledge Graph entities University of Oregon RouteViews Project WikiSQL - NL to SQL Llama 2 A comprehensive guide to running Llama 2 locally llama-2-7b-hf - Converted model weights for Llama-2-7B in Huggingface format Ollama Natural Language to SQL mlsql - paper implementations; quick play but non-production quality Text To SQL Knowledge Graph arrows.app Neo4j Desktop Graph Apps Gallery - Plugin apps for Neo4j Desktop that provide new capabilities, like Monitoring, Import, Analysis, Running Graph Algorithms, Visualization and much more Open Data OpenConcepts - Entity API 中文开放知识图谱 Design Vectorian ornaments SVG/LOGO Brandfetch Worldvectorlogo API Stylebook Design Guidelines LaTeX CTAN - The "Maven Central" for LaTeX LaTeX math equation online editor MacTeX - LaTeX comes with various installation packges, some are minimized versions. The comprehensive package is MacTeX QuickLaTeX.com - Instant math equation syntax checker and sharing via image online texlive package manager - Installing a LaTeX package. e.g. sudo tlmgr update --self && sudo tlmgr install pgfornament Popular CTAN Packages pgfornament tcolorbox Frontend Dev Defensive CSS Nodesource - Universal node & npm installer npm trends The Modern JavaScript Tutorial uiverse.io - Open-Source UI component templates UI Performance Lighthouse CI Action - Maintained by third party, no GitHub App install required, no dedicated UI report hosting server required Lighthouse CI - Maintained by Google, GitHub App install required, UI report hosting requires dedicated server Lighthouse PageSpeed Insights Performance Budget Calculator Request Map Generator Third Party Web Mock Backend json-graphql-server json-server - Quick back-end for prototyping and mocking lowdb - Simple to use type-safe local JSON database Backend Dev API Platform (also checkout this interesting startup ) Generate SQL DB Schema Diagram get.docker.com - Installing Docker on Linux with an automated script JSON to JSON Schema converter online IntelliJ Intellij Ubuntu Light Theme - an Idea theme plugin whose color scheme follows the famous Ubuntu Color Palette String Manipulation plugin - With a simple Alt / Option + M you get case switching, sorting, filtering, incrementing, aligning to columns, grepping, escaping, encoding, and more Java Defensive Copy Java Decompiler Java Generics FAQs jConsole Learning Java via Jenkov VisualVM Diagnostic Tools The jhat Utility The jinfo Utility The jmap Utility The jps Utility The jstack Utility The jstat Utility GraphQL gqt - Build and execute GraphQL queries in the terminal GraphiQL online Database MySQL Tutorial Oracle Tutorial DevOps OpenStack Swift Docker Language Lexilogos - A comprehensive set of resources for the study of the languages of the world Quizlet - Vocabulary was made very fun by this awesome app! Textkit Greek and Latin Forums Korean Papago - The best Korean dictionary. Make sure to download their mobile APP 延世大学韩国语教材全套(1-6册) 李思皎韩语 Ancient Greek Ancient Greek Dictionary Ancient Greek Language resources on Reddit Hansen and Quinn "Greek an intensive course" A full set of translations for the exercises in all twenty chapters Complementary materials Hansen and Quinn Videos by PlayGreek Partial answer keys for the textbook Latin PHI corpus The Latin Library Hans Ørberg's Lingua Latina per se illustrata series Lingua Latina: Colloquia Personarum audios Lingua Latina: Pars I: Familia Romana audios Old Persian Old Persian Keyboard Online • Cuneiforms Miscellaneous command-not-found.com - Dealing with "command not found" Error Convert curl command to programming language code Convert JSON to YAML Discourse - A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple. Escape/Unescape Tool git-crypt Greasy Fork - A nice browser per-website customization such as de-流氓 script by Bilibili martinfowler.com Online JSON formatter Online Self-Signed SSL Certificate Generator Tool for Website Random String Generator smee.io - Receives payloads then sends them to your locally running application Software architecture tools Unix Time Stamp - Epoch Converter URL Decoder/Encoder whatismyip.com Machine Learning Must-Read Papers RNNs are Turing-Complete - Extended reading for studying RNN , a prerequisite to studying Transformers Contributing Your contributions are always welcome! Please take a look at the contribution guidelines first. I will keep some pull requests open if I'm not sure whether those libraries are awesome, you could vote for them by adding :+1: to them. Pull requests will be merged when their votes reach 20 . License The use and distribution terms for awesome-tools are covered by the Apache License, Version 2.0 . If you have any question about this opinionated list, do not hesitate to contact me or open an issue on GitHub.
